creator: Nakai@Mlab.t.u-tokyo.ac.jp
text:
I have made a new port 'snes97'.
Snes97 is an emulator of the Super NES.
It needs the linux emulation and ROM cartridge.
Enjoy!

Yukihiro Nakai
